name: no-sdr
description: Multi-user WebSDR server for RTL-SDR dongles — real-time waterfall, stereo FM, AM/SSB/CW, digital mode decoding

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=shared && start /B npm run dev --workspace=server & timeout /T 3 /NOBREAK >nul & npm run dev --workspace=client
scripts.dev:demo: npm run build --workspace=shared && set NODE_SDR_DEMO=1 && start /B npm run dev --workspace=server & timeout /T 3 /NOBREAK >nul & npm run dev --workspace=client
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.clean: rmdir /s /q shared\dist server\dist client\dist 2>nul & del /f /s /q node_modules\.cache shared\tsconfig.tsbuildinfo server\tsconfig.tsbuildinfo 2>nul
